The current banner you want to pull in the following order:

1 copy of thais and Gmurphy -> 1 copy of their wheels -> E2 thais(good stop point) -> E3 Gmurphy -> 1 copy of tulu wheel ->

(Optional) 1 copy of tulu -> wheel dupe
So if you get off banner it could theoretically be an arc 1 units wheel

altho if i have a dupe of someone i wont play as much, could i use it to then use the origin of time to get a generic dupe thingy out of him? not 100% sure on how this works yet despite reading up on it haha
free edification rewards.
you can level up a character to your max edification level, claim the edification rewards, and reset them to get back all your materials while still keeping those rewards
yes.

if you have, for example, an e2 Alva, then you can use Origin of Time to either use Genesis Return to get 3 Protoparadises and remove Alva from your account, or you can use Enlightenment Reset to only remove her extra dupes and get 2 Protoparadises

For Character Event Awakening, you are guaranteed an SSR in 30 pulls. If you get 2 standard SSRs in a row, your third SSR is the rate-up.

This means that the max pity for the rate-up is 90, and the average pity is 42.

- Gluttony (fangs) lets you forsake an orison you receive at the end of a battle and instead get +20% max HP. You can do this twice for an effective +44% max HP, and it also heals you.
- Frenzy (eye) and Emerge (volcano) is the setup for cursed relics in store, they're quite strong.

- Whisper (ear) and Aged (wheat) gives you aliemus and keyflare respectively at the end of a battle, which greatly helps with mob fights. 
- Vitality (waves) lets you remove symptoms in campfires
- Hope (dove) is a mandatory equip if you plan on using Emergency Gnosis. If you don't plan on it though, don't take it.

Just noticed your Question, but you can probably get a decent team running Sanga with other Poison Applicators like Nymphea / Lily, Caecus / Agrippa, with Flex Slots for a Chorus / Warden of your Choice for Chaos / Caro depending on whichever Team you're running. But doing this is definitely not recommended, as Poison Teams are generally not as effective as simply running Carry Type DPS Units to deal Explosive Damage during Burst Turns with the help of dedicated Strength / Crit / Vulnerable Supports and a Warden to trigger Death Resistance if needed or simply generate large Shields / Heal

just making sure I understand correctly since I've never played a gacha - pulling for the limited like thais or gmurphy will be guaranteed after 90 pulls and then their banners are guaranteed after 60?

and i see someone earlier recommended going wide cause theres dupe items, so going for 1 copy of gmurphy and thais and then their wheels before trying to enlighten any sounds correct?
for the first question, that is correct. the second question, that works, but you need to consider that gmurphy's banners are leaving soon

Yep. Gacha rules and pity are shared between banners of the same category. In general, an SSR is guaranteed in 30 pulls.

For Character Event Awakening, there is a 33% chance the SSR is the rateup, and 66% chance that its a standard. Get two standards in a row and the third will be the rateup. So a maximum of 90 pity and an average of 42.

For Character WoD Awakening, it’s a 50/50, and you only need to lose once for your second SSR to be guaranteed rateup. Max pity is 60, average is 30
